description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet themed around the character Kirby, featuring a predominantly pink color scheme with black trim. The front panel displays a large screen showing a retro video game scene, with a control panel below that includes two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The marquee at the top is adorned with the Kirby logo and vibrant artwork, while the side panels are decorated with large, colorful graphics of Kirby and Japanese text. The lower front section includes a coin slot mechanism, typical of arcade machines. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and has a boxy, angular shape with a slightly slanted screen for ergonomic viewing. The back panel is plain with ventilation slots and an access hatch, indicating where maintenance or wiring access would occur.
description: A pink Kirby-themed upright arcade game cabinet with colorful side graphics, a large screen, dual joysticks, and a coin slot. The cabinet features a prominent marquee and a classic retro design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with a Kirby game, dual joysticks, multiple colored buttons, coin slot, and the Kirby marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large Kirby and star artwork, Japanese text, and the angled control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain pink panel with ventilation slots and an access hatch, no graphics or controls visible.
description_view_3: Right side view, mirroring the left, with identical Kirby and star graphics and Japanese text.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and twelve colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a symmetrical layout and vibrant color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Kirby logo in stylized text with a pink and yellow color palette, set against a matching pink background with playful, cartoonish graphics.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful graphics of Kirby holding a star, Japanese text, and a winged emblem, all set against a pink background.
